source: Generated manifest. Content is canonical in git: agent profiles in brain-config/agents/*.md (+ agent.json identity), hook profiles in brain-config/hooks/, gate profiles in brain-config/gates/. Hooks/triggers with no repo profile are prose-canonical in the ClickUp AI Toolkit index. This file + the brain-config viewer are PROJECTIONS. Regenerate when a profile changes; Scribe Sana + Closing Clio verify at session close.

schema.tool: slug | name | kind(hook|trigger|gate) | status | summary | profile(repo path or null)
schema.agent: slug | name | type(subagent|gate) | status(active|building|dormant|retired) | seat | teams[] | role | profile | accent | hasReports
schema.team: slug | name | invocation | fires | lead | members[]
schema.domain_procedure: slug | name | type(trigger) | status | trigger | doc

hooks.name: De-Slop Pass
hooks.summary: Strips AI filler and hedging from final wording.

hooks.name: Source & ID Guard
hooks.summary: Verifies sources and IDs before they are stated.

hooks.name: Date & Math Guard
hooks.summary: Checks dates, weekday math, and arithmetic.

hooks.name: Hygiene Sweep
hooks.summary: Final formatting and consistency pass.

hooks.name: Clarify First
hooks.summary: Asks before guessing when a key detail is missing.

hooks.name: Voice Match
hooks.summary: Matches Michael's register; subsumes Tone Dial.

hooks.name: Naming Canonicalizer
hooks.summary: Normalizes names to their canonical form.

hooks.name: Compression
hooks.summary: Tightens verbose output without losing signal.

hooks.name: Steelman / Red Team
hooks.summary: Argues the strongest opposing case before committing.

hooks.name: Model Fit Advisor
hooks.summary: Flags when a different model would serve the turn better.

hooks.name: Question Block
hooks.summary: Formats follow-up questions as a copy-pastable block.

hooks.name: When Updating Existing Work
hooks.summary: Loads full context and history before modifying anything.

hooks.name: Triggered Tool Router
hooks.summary: Three-question gate routing to Update / Document / Build.

hooks.name: Secrets / PII Guard
hooks.summary: Halts any repo write carrying keys, tokens, or PII.

hooks.name: Source-Size Budget Enforcer
hooks.summary: Measures file size vs budget; flags or routes to a split.

hooks.name: Skill-Ban Guard
hooks.summary: Byte-scans committed UI for the active skill's hard bans.

hooks.name: Post-Build Verify
hooks.summary: Fetches the live URL after a Pages commit to confirm it flipped.

hooks.name: Stale Context Reload
hooks.summary: Re-fetches a file before editing if the read is stale.

hooks.name: Commit Pre-Flight
hooks.summary: Pre-commit checklist: SHA, branch, .nojekyll, message, size.

hooks.name: Task Dedup Gate
hooks.summary: Three-step search before creating any task.

hooks.name: Artifact Ship Paperwork
hooks.summary: Post-commit paperwork: task desc, version comment, indexes.

hooks.name: Link Provenance
hooks.summary: Verifies a ClickUp URL's source before emitting it.

hooks.name: Multi-Edit Batch Gate
hooks.summary: Plans and batches 3+ edits to one file to avoid cascade fails.

hooks.name: Memory Edit Guard
hooks.summary: Pre-write gate validating any memory edit.

hooks.name: Memory Write Relay
hooks.summary: On a failed memory write, emits a copy-paste block and defers.

triggers.name: Session Open
triggers.summary: First response of a session: surface activity, prime context.

triggers.name: Session Close
triggers.summary: Wind-down: flag threads, post memory audit + session log.

triggers.name: Scope Lock
triggers.summary: Related-docs pass and scope validation before implementing.

triggers.name: When Coding
triggers.summary: Coding router: prefs, language, load the domain gate.

triggers.name: Chunked Document Review
triggers.summary: Holds action until all parts of a multi-part doc arrive.

triggers.name: When Building Apps
triggers.summary: App router: load Apps reference, check APPS list, enforce conventions.

triggers.name: When Researching
triggers.summary: Research router: multi-source, links mandatory, one recommendation.

triggers.name: When Documenting
triggers.summary: Doc hygiene: load existing, no dupes, current-truth-first.

triggers.name: When Planning/Scoping
triggers.summary: Planning router: structure, propose the system, estimate scope.

triggers.name: Schema Linter
triggers.summary: Validates record shape against the domain schema.

triggers.name: Revision Log Tracker
triggers.summary: Keeps a running revision log on iterative work.

triggers.name: HTML Artifact Regeneration
triggers.summary: Regenerates an artifact from its source on change.

triggers.name: Attachment Router
triggers.summary: Classifies any attached file and routes to a type branch.

triggers.name: PDF Split Markdown Packager
triggers.summary: Emits splitter import-markdown for a document.

triggers.name: Memory Hygiene Review
triggers.summary: Periodically reconciles memory against the reference docs.

gates.name: Roster Scan Planner
gates.summary: Outermost gate: reads all shelves, builds an execution plan. Absorbed by Maestro Mira.

gates.name: Agent Invocation Gate
gates.summary: Disambiguates agent names from real-person mentions.

agents.name: Maestro Mira
agents.role: Council Conductor; Michael's primary touchpoint. Absorbs the Roster Scan Planner as step 1.

agents.name: Mimic Mika
agents.role: Multi-model role-play; channels how rival frontier models would each answer.

agents.name: Cautious Cass
agents.role: Overconfidence check; safest reply + where confidence outruns evidence.

agents.name: Literal Lena
agents.role: Literalist; what was literally asked vs what Brain is inflating it into.

agents.name: Counter Cole
agents.role: Contrarian; strongest case against Brain's leaning.

agents.name: Pivot Piper
agents.role: Third door; rejects the framed binary and reframes the question.

agents.name: Novice Nia
agents.role: Naive questioner; beginner questions that expose foundational errors. Bound to Domain Dara.

agents.name: Domain Dara
agents.role: Domain expert; the outside specialist the question needs. Bound to Novice Nia.

agents.name: Future Faye
agents.role: Future-self; reviews the draft assuming handoff at this exact step. (Was Wes's Handoff lens.)

agents.name: Fold-in Frank
agents.role: Anti-Sprawl Gate; the FIRST voice when a new tool/team/structure is floated, checks whether it folds into something existing. Fires at brainstorm-open, ahead of the Workshop.

agents.name: Risk Rhys
agents.role: Risk & Failure lens.

agents.name: Clever Cleo
agents.role: Elegance & Alternative lens.

agents.name: Polish Polly
agents.role: Quality & Standards lens.

agents.name: Feasible Finn
agents.role: Implementation & Feasibility lens.

agents.name: Scope Skye
agents.role: Boundaries & Creep lens.

agents.name: Eco Enzo
agents.role: Integration & Side Effects lens.

agents.name: Scribe Sana
agents.role: Documentation logger; logs where the permanent record needs updating as work happens.

agents.name: Handoff Hana
agents.role: Handoff packager; the next-session baton.

agents.name: Closing Clio
agents.role: Session-close auditor; inventory refs, log hurdles, reconcile docs + indexes, report health.

agents.name: Scout Sage
agents.role: Research runner; multi-source sourced lookup with confidence + one recommendation.

agents.name: Recon Renata
agents.role: Repo auditor; audits mawizorek/ClickUp_apps vs the operating standard. Read-only.

agents.name: Workshop Wes
agents.role: RETIRED 2026-07-04. Decomposed into The Workshop (6 lenses) + Future Faye. Tombstone.

teams.name: The Council
teams.invocation: always-on (Maestro Mira presides on substantive turns)

domain_procedures.name: World Cup Refresh
domain_procedures.note: Seasonal; reopens next tournament. Went dormant after 2026-07-19 final.
domain_procedures.trigger: match day, bracket, WC score update
